sections.paragraph:
Original: חרפּה

Transliteration: cherpâh

Phonetic: kher-paw'

BDB Definition:

  1. reproach, scorn
    1. taunt, scorn (upon enemy)
    2. reproach (resting upon condition of shame, disgrace)
    3. a reproach (an object)

Origin: from H2778

TWOT entry: 749a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
